mapper.select: select id, name, type, rate, afoot_roll_back, end_roll_back, pos from customer_stage_config where organization_id = #{orgId} order by pos asc
mapper.update:
UPDATE customer_stage_config
afoot_roll_back =#{request.afootRollBack},
end_roll_back = #{request.endRollBack},
WHERE organization_id = #{orgId}
update customer_stage_config set name = #{request.name}, rate = #{request.rate}, update_user = #{userId}, update_time = unix_timestamp() * 1000 where id = #{request.id}
mapper.select: select id, name, organization_id, type, rate from customer_stage_config
mapper.update: update customer_stage_config set pos = pos - 1 where pos > #{start} and pos <= #{end}
update customer_stage_config set pos = pos + 1 where pos >= #{start} and pos < #{end}
update customer_stage_config set pos = #{pos} where id = #{id}
